headline: Shell Signs New Engineering Framework Agreement With Chiyoda
summary: SHEL signs a new agreement with Chiyoda to speed engineering support, improve project execution and strengthen delivery across global energy projects.

headline: Halliburton Teams Up With Shape Digital for AI Asset Management
summary: HAL teams with Shape Digital to unify subsurface and operational data, helping operators improve production planning, reliability, safety and efficiency.
